nasb.text: and you return to the Lord your God and obey Him with all your heart and soul according to all that I command you today, you and your sons,

esv.text: and return to the Lord your God, you and your children, and obey his voice in all that I command you today, with all your heart and with all your soul,

cnv.text: 你和你的子孫必一心一意歸向耶和華你的　神，照著我今日吩咐你的一切聽從他的話。

ccb.text: 归向你们的上帝耶和华，你们及子孙照我今天的吩咐全心全意地听从祂的话，
